chunks.title: Oracle Against Tyre's Arrogance
chunks.reason: The prophet introduces the oracle and declares God's judgment on Tyre for rejoicing over Jerusalem's fall.

chunks.title: Description of Babylonian Siege
chunks.reason: This section details the specific military actions Nebuchadnezzar will take to destroy Tyre.

chunks.title: Lament and Final Destruction
chunks.reason: The passage concludes with the reaction of coastal cities, a lamentation song, and the final declaration of Tyre's total ruin.
